description: Single keyword, all four platforms, no season — produces 4 platform profiles with no null competition_estimate

expect.competition_estimate: all cells have non-null value labeled [estimated]
expect.seasonal_relevance: null in all cells (no season provided)
expect.momentum: null in all cells (check_trend_momentum defaults to false)
expect.cross_platform_verdict: universal | platform_specific | niche_long_tail — exactly one value

prohibit: momentum with a non-null value when check_trend_momentum was not provided
fabrication_flags listing any field that was correctly derived from inputs

description: 10-keyword batch, 2 platforms — all 10 analyzed, keywords_overflow empty

expect.universal_keywords: array (may be empty) of keywords with universal verdict
expect.platform_exclusive_opportunities: youtube and pinterest keys present; google and tiktok keys absent or empty

prohibit: keywords_overflow non-empty (10 is within the limit)

description: 11-keyword overflow — first 10 analyzed, 11th reported in keywords_overflow
prohibit: silent truncation without noting in keywords_overflow or retrieval_gaps

description: Season context provided — seasonal_relevance non-null, seasonal_timing_summary present

expect.seasonal_relevance: non-null in all 6 cells (3 keywords x 2 platforms)
expect.seasonal_timing_summary: non-null string describing fall publishing lead times
expect.comparison_matrix: seasonal_relevance peak for fall-themed keywords, off_season for christmas

prohibit: seasonal_relevance null when season was provided
seasonal_timing_summary absent when season was provided
christmas/holiday keyword marked peak for fall season

description: Trend momentum enabled — momentum field populated in each cell or marked unknown with retrieval_gap

expect.momentum: rising | flat | declining | unknown in all 4 cells (not null)
expect.fabrication_flags: empty — unknown is a valid value, not fabrication

prohibit: specific momentum percentages or volume claims

description: Momentum scope warning — 6 keywords x 4 platforms = 24 calls > 20 threshold triggers advisory in retrieval_gaps

expect.retrieval_gaps: contains scope warning mentioning 24 calls or N x M > 20
expect.comparison_matrix: 6 rows with 4 platform profiles each — atom still runs despite warning

prohibit: atom refusing to run or returning empty matrix due to scope warning

description: Platform-specific verdict — keyword with strong fit only on Pinterest returns platform_specific with strongest_platform=pinterest

expect.platform_profiles: pinterest profile shows image_pack serp_feature and low-medium competition

prohibit: cross_platform_verdict universal when only one platform has strong fit
strongest_platform youtube or tiktok for an inspiration/mood-board keyword
fabricated search volume or position rank
